positive: A vibrant and stylized forest scene featuring whimsical flora and gentle forest creatures, such as friendly woodland foxes, hummingbirds, and stylized deer. The composition should be highly detailed, arranged in a circular, symmetrical pattern suitable for a textile print. Use a limited, complementary color palette of emerald green, sapphire blue, burnt orange, and creamy yellow. Focus on strong outlines and clean silhouettes, giving the image a slightly graphic novel or stained-glass quality. The scene must be central, high-contrast, and perfectly optimized for white or natural fabric printing. Style: Art Nouveau meets Mid-Century Illustration, vector-like precision, 8k resolution, highly intricate detailing, flat-lay presentation.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, grayscale, solid background, jpeg compression, hyperrealistic, photo, logo
